creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

Author: eadler
Date: Thu Jan 24 06:30:56 2013
New Revision: 245872
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/base/245872

Log:
  Indicate a bunch of new hardware support.
